productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Camel Shoes
description: Style NoteDesert boots in light two-tone hue, work the all-American aesthetic with a cosmopolitan twist with this united colors of benetton shoe. Understated urban chic is the mood of the moment - nail the look with this pair.Product DetailsRound toed, casual desert boot in camel beige with lace-ups and a mid-top styling Tough synthetic upper with reinforced overlays at the heel collarPadded collar and tongue and an ergonomically shaped insolePU midsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves (stitch detail on the outsole)Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
